name: DOM节点生命周期
mechanism_summary: DOM节点经历创建(createElement/cloneNode/解析器)→插入(appendChild/Fragment)→更新(textContent/style/attribute)→销毁(remove/removeChild)四阶段。插入文档树后触发Layout和Paint，批量操作可用DocumentFragment合并。节点移除后若JS仍持有引用则无法GC，导致Detached DOM内存泄漏。自定义元素提供connectedCallback/disconnectedCallback等生命周期钩子。

bottlenecks.name: 频繁DOM操作导致多次Layout
bottlenecks.trigger: 循环中逐个插入/修改节点
bottlenecks.mitigation: DocumentFragment批量插入、innerHTML一次性写入、虚拟列表

bottlenecks.name: 事件监听器泄漏
bottlenecks.trigger: 组件销毁时未清理事件监听器

bottlenecks.name: innerHTML导致子节点全部重建
bottlenecks.symptom: 丢失子节点状态、大范围Reflow

bottlenecks.name: Detached DOM节点内存泄漏
bottlenecks.trigger: 节点从文档移除但JS仍引用
bottlenecks.detection: Chrome DevTools Memory Heap Snapshot Detached过滤
bottlenecks.mitigation: 移除节点时清除引用、使用WeakMap/WeakRef

tradeoffs.name: innerHTML vs DOM API
tradeoffs.description: innerHTML写入快但销毁子节点丢失状态；DOM API精确控制但代码量大易多次Layout

tradeoffs.name: DocumentFragment vs 虚拟DOM
tradeoffs.description: Fragment零依赖适合简单批量插入；虚拟DOM自动Diff但有额外Diff开销

tradeoffs.name: 事件委托 vs 直接绑定
tradeoffs.description: 委托内存开销小适合大量同类节点；直接绑定响应快但开销大

experiment_code: DOM生命周期实验
